meaning: n.金龟子(一种以植物为食的甲虫)
examples: It can prey on many larvae and otherfarming and forestry pests such as locust , chafer etc.
A clock struck seven, and round the shady lime-tree a chafer or some heavy insect commenced its booming rushes.
The influence of anti-scorching agent CTP on blooming from bead chafer of PCR tire was experimentally investigated.
